He still catches up with his competitor.

title: Rising global hail damage potential in a warming world
description: Hailstone trajectory simulations conducted under historical and future scenarios show a shift towards larger hailstones, resulting in global hailstorm-induced damage potential increasing by around 40% by the late twenty-first century.
content:
• Munich Re. Hail, tornadoes, flash floods: losses from thunderstorms on the rise. Munich Rehttps://www.munichre.com/en/risks/natural-disasters/thunderstorms-hail-tornados.html. (2025).
  • B… [+14466 chars]
de: Steigendes globales Hagelschadenpotenzial in einer sich erwärmenden Welt. Simulationen der Flugbahn von Hagelkörnern, die unter historischen und zukünftigen Szenarien durchgeführt wurden, zeigen eine Verschiebung hin zu größeren Hagelkörnern, was dazu führt, dass das durch Hagelstürme verursachte Schadenspotenzial weltweit bis zum Ende des 21. Jahrhunderts um etwa 40 % ansteigt.
en: Rising global hail damage potential in a warming world. Hailstone trajectory simulations conducted under historical and future scenarios show a shift towards larger hailstones, resulting in global hailstorm-induced damage potential increasing by around 40% by the late twenty-first century.
